properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: O soul, are you weary and troubled? No light in the darkness you see? There’s light for a look at the Saviour, And life more abundant and free!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Turn your eyes upon Jesus, Look full in His wonderful face; And the things of earth will grow strangely dim In the light of His glory and grace.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Through death into life everlasting He passed, and we follow Him there; Over us sin no more hath dominion, For more than conqu’rors we are!

verse.name: v4
